notes: New Maintain section: Lines & Tubes, generic Devices & Timers (warranty serial/photo + change history), and Today's Medications. Real medication-adherence tracking with history, analytics & PDF export. Nurse-feedback clinical trackers: GU, ENT, Postpartum & Newborn, Endocrine (Thyroid/Adrenal). Personalization (name, pronouns, gender, parent/feeding terms) in Customize + onboarding. Sidebar Declutter. Scheduled OS notifications. Theme/scroll/font polish.
